meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve No SaaS Knowledge
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between client needs and technical execution. Learn a repeatable, AI-driven workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship SaaS fast.
content.answer_block: Overcome the 'no SaaS knowledge' hurdle by adopting a modular, AI-first architecture. By combining Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you can transform vague client requirements into production-ready SaaS features in hours, not weeks. This workflow ensures professional output while minimizing technical debt and development time.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, a client's vague vision in your inbox, and a gnawing anxiety that you lack the deep SaaS architecture experience to pull this off. The pressure to ship is mounting, and the gap between 'idea' and 'production' feels like a canyon. You don't need a computer science degree; you need a system that thinks for you.

This isn't about writing boilerplate code until your fingers ache. It's about leveraging high-leverage AI agents to act as your senior engineering lead. By shifting your workflow from manual construction to intelligent orchestration, you turn your lack of deep technical background into a competitive advantage: speed, precision, and relentless iteration.

steps.title: Requirement Mapping
steps.description: Transform client jargon into structured technical specifications.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these client notes and generate a structured technical requirement document (TRD) covering core features, database schema, and authentication requirements.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review this TRD and highlight any critical technical blockers for a MVP launch.'

steps.title: Scaffold Infrastructure
steps.description: Generate the foundational directory structure and configuration files.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a production-ready Next.js SaaS boilerplate with Tailwind CSS, Supabase integration, and Shadcn UI components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'mkdir my-saas && cd my-saas && npm init -y'

steps.title: Database Schema Generation
steps.description: Define the data layer using AI-assisted schema modeling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a PostgreSQL schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including tables for users, subscriptions, and projects.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code 'Apply this SQL schema to my Supabase instance via migration scripts.'

steps.title: Component Logic Iteration
steps.description: Build UI features iteratively using Claude Code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive dashboard layout component with sidebar navigation and data visualization placeholders.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code 'Implement the dashboard layout and ensure all components are accessible and mobile-responsive.'

steps.title: Automated Testing & QA
steps.description: Use AI to write and execute unit tests for critical paths.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Playwright test scripts for the user sign-up and authentication flow.

pro_tips: Treat your AI agents as junior developers; always ask them to explain their logic before running the code.
Use a modular 'Atomic Design' approach to your components so you can reuse them across multiple client projects.
Always run your AI-generated code through a secondary 'Security Audit' prompt to catch common vulnerabilities.
Keep your context windows lean by summarizing previous steps in every new prompt for higher accuracy.
Document your AI prompts in a 'Prompt Library' repo to turn your workflow into a repeatable, scalable asset.
content.next_steps: After completing your first build, document the 'gotchas' you encountered, refine your prompt library, and begin pitching higher-value features to your clients using your newfound speed.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start building at scale. Our community provides the templates, the prompts, and the peer support you need to dominate the freelance market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
